conventions.naming_style: snake_case for all files and folders
conventions.layout: feature subdirectories under backend/app/ capability folder (backend/app/{cap}/feature_name/models.py)

rules: Do NOT reorganize the scaffolded folder structure.
Place files in the directories indicated by path_mappings.
Follow the naming conventions above for new files.
Read CONVENTIONS.md at the project root for the 6-file module pattern and naming conventions.
Each feature gets its own subdirectory under the capability folder. Files use short names (models.py, api.py) — NOT prefixed names.
